description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled Honda Motocompo scooter with a distinctive rectangular yellow body and black seat. The scooter features two solid wheels, a single padded seat, and a set of upright handlebars equipped with mirrors and controls. The body is mostly yellow with some black and gray accents, and it has a rear light cluster and a license plate at the back. The side panels display a 'MOTOCOMPO' decal, and the top surface includes visible instructions and branding. The overall design is minimalistic, with integrated components and a flat deck area. The scooter appears lightweight and portable, suitable for urban commuting and easy storage.
description: A compact yellow Honda Motocompo scooter with a rectangular body, black seat, and upright handlebars. It features two wheels, rear lights, and visible branding on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow body, black seat, rear wheel, and 'MOTOCOMPO' decal.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the upright handlebars, mirrors, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, including the side decal and visible engine vent.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate, and 'HONDA' branding.
attribute_deck_design: rectangular, flat, medium-length, wide, smooth surface with some printed instructions and branding
attribute_brand_logo: HONDA logo on the rear, 'MOTOCOMPO' decal on both sides
